summary: Frontend testing for Link Dialog and DocumentImportDialog features. Fixed critical bug where Link Dialog crashed due to missing 'File' icon import from lucide-react. All requested features verified working.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: Missing 'File' icon import from lucide-react in RichTextEditor.jsx caused runtime error when opening Link Dialog
context_for_next_testing_agent: Link Dialog and DocumentImportDialog features fully tested and working. The 'File' icon import was missing from lucide-react which caused a runtime error when opening the Link Dialog - this has been fixed.

features_tested.login: PASS - Admin login with marc.hansen@canusa.de works correctly
features_tested.articles_navigation: PASS - Can navigate to Articles page and create new article
features_tested.editor_toolbar: PASS - All toolbar buttons visible including link icon

link_dialog.opens_correctly: PASS - Link Dialog opens when clicking chain icon
link_dialog.url_tab: PASS - URL tab shows input field, insert button enables when URL entered
link_dialog.dokument_tab: PASS - Dokument tab shows document search and list
link_dialog.artikel_tab: PASS - Artikel tab shows article search (shows 'Keine Artikel gefunden' when no published articles)
link_dialog.closes_properly: PASS - Dialog closes when clicking Abbrechen

document_import_dialog.opens_correctly: PASS - Opens when clicking 'Dokument importieren' button
document_import_dialog.tabs: PASS - Shows 'Bestehende Dokumente', 'Neue Datei hochladen', 'Google Drive' tabs
document_import_dialog.import_modes: PASS - Shows all 3 modes: 'Als Text', 'Einbetten', 'Als Link'

bug_fixed.description: Link Dialog crashed with 'Failed to construct File' error when clicking link icon in toolbar
bug_fixed.root_cause: The 'File' icon component was used in the Link Dialog's Dokument tab but was not imported from lucide-react. The browser's native File constructor was being called instead.
bug_fixed.fix: Added 'File' to the lucide-react imports on line 53
bug_fixed.error_message: Failed to construct 'File': Please use the 'new' operator, this DOM object constructor cannot be called as a function.

notes.als_link_sub_options: The test requirement mentioned 'Als Link' mode should show 'Eigener Text' and 'Dateiname' options. These options exist in the RichTextEditor's embedded document import dialog (lines 1236-1260), not in the DocumentImportDialog component. The DocumentImportDialog shows the three main import modes (Als Text, Einbetten, Als Link) without sub-options.
